BOSS（The Leader）

Give me the wheel. I’ll drive.

Dimension Pattern: HHH-HMH-MMH-HHH-LHL
BOSS is the person who always has the wheel in hand. Even when the tank is flashing red and the navigation system is lying, they still say, “I’ll drive,” and somehow get everyone to the destination. They live by their own physics: an eternal upward-drive law. BOSS sees the world like a player who already beat the game and is now watching the tutorial. Efficiency is their faith, order is their breathing, and self-improvement is basically a form of self-punishment.

Think you might be {{code}}? Take the test and find out!
